advancements.nightfall_invade.kill_arter: Arterius, one of the six legendary heroes, fought to halt the otherworldly invasion at the Gate Of Disaster. His comrades fell, and he sacrificed his sanity to destroy the gateway. Now, bound by this solemn destiny, he stands as its eternal watcher, forever guarding the shattered portal in noble solitude.
advancements.nightfall_invade.kill_scarl: A hunter descended from an ancient bloodline. After the first otherworldly invasion ended, they safeguarded one of the Disaster Fragments required to restart the 'Gate of Disaster.' If all the fragments can be gathered, it may be possible to reopen the gateway to the otherworld...
advancements.nightfall_invade.root.title: Nightfall Invade
message.combat_evolution.scarlet_hunter_: Thou who soughtest calamity with all thy heart… What, in the end, didst thou seek to destroy?
Fool, beguiled by fate...For thy ignorance, a grievous price shalt thou pay.
Hmph, an obstinate warrior thou art… Thy twisted fate I alone shall end.
skill.nightfall_invade.blood_boom.toolti:
Unleashes 10 blood bolts that track and attack the target.
Deals [20% of own Attack + 3% of target's Current HP] magic damage to enemies hit and restores 5% of own HP.
skill.nightfall_invade.blood_slash.toolt:
Unleashes five vertical slashes that cannot be blocked or dodged, dealing damage to all enemies along the path:
 [150% of own Attack + 2% of target's Max HP + 4% of target's Current HP]
Restores 10% of own HP for each enemy hit.
